$comment: Source reliability ledger (SNR_SPEC.md 7.1, contract in SNR_PLAN.md A4). Machine-owned: updated only by scheduled runs; human-auditable via the rendered report. Rolling 90-day window for demotion/recovery decisions; claims records power the calibration report and are written at scoring time, never reconstructed.
